record.field: Send a message to a member's guardian

Message John's parent about his progress Email Sarah's guardian about the upcoming test Send a note to Test8's mom Contact Mike's parents about his attendance Let Jane's guardian know about the schedule change
Send a direct email to a member, guardian, or contact

Email John's mom: class is cancelled tomorrow Send an email to Sarah's guardian about the belt test Email Mike: great job at the tournament this weekend Send Sarah an email saying she needs to wear her gi next class Write an email to John: your attendance is excellent this month
Send a direct SMS text message to a member or guardian

Text John: don't forget belt test is Saturday Send SMS to Mike's mom: class is starting 30 minutes late today Text Sarah: great performance this week SMS Mike: your uniform needs to be washed before next class Send a text to John: come in early on Friday for sparring prep
Send a mass email to all members (or filtered group)

Email all active members about the tournament next weekend Send a blast email to members: dojo will be closed Monday Email all trial members: sign up by Friday to get the first month free Send an announcement email to everyone about the belt ceremony Create an email campaign for all active students about the new schedule
Send email blast to all {membership_state} members: "{subject}"?
Send a mass SMS text message to all members (or filtered group)

SMS all members: dojo is closed this Saturday Text everyone: belt test is moved to Sunday at noon Send a text blast to active members about the new class schedule SMS all trial members: free week ends Friday, sign up now Text everyone about the tornado drill cancellation
Send SMS blast to all {membership_state} members?
What follow-ups do I have? Show my scheduled activities What calls do I need to make? Show overdue activities What reminders do I have this week? List my pending follow-ups
Schedule a follow-up activity (call, email reminder, meeting, etc.)

Schedule a follow-up call with John's parents next Tuesday Remind me to check Sarah's attendance on Friday Create an activity: send welcome email to new trial students by Monday Set a reminder to prepare belt test certificates for Saturday Add a follow-up activity for Mike: discuss attendance issues
